products.title: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)
products.description: Active noise cancellation, adaptive transparency, and personalized spatial audio. Up to 6 hours of listening time, 30 hours total with case.

products.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading noise canceling with Dual Noise Sensor technology. Up to 30-hour battery life with quick charging.

products.title: Kindle Paperwhite (16 GB)
products.description: Now with a larger 6.8" display and thinner borders, adjustable warm light, up to 10 weeks of battery life.

products.title: LEGO Technic Bugatti Chiron
products.description: 3,599 pieces. Replica of the real Bugatti Chiron with functioning W16 engine, gearbox, and rear spoiler.

products.title: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1
products.description: Pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, yogurt maker, and warmer in one appliance.

products.title: Nike Air Max 270
products.description: The Nike Air Max 270 delivers a super-soft ride with the tallest Air unit yet. Lightweight knit upper for breathability.

products.title: The Great Gatsby - F. Scott Fitzgerald
products.description: A timeless classic. Set in the Jazz Age on Long Island, the novel depicts narrator Nick Carraway's interactions with Jay Gatsby.

products.title: Vitamix 5200 Blender
products.description: Professional-grade blender with variable speed control. Self-cleaning in 30 to 60 seconds. 64 oz container.
